name: v1.0.1
body:
## v1.0.1 — First Major Release

This release stabilizes the agent-teams engine, dual-model routing, and guarded execution, and is the first 1.x line.

### Highlights

- **Agent teams & roundtable review**: add a refute stage to roundtable review to filter false positives; skip tool messages for cancelled handoff results.
- **Read loops & loop detection**: add `read_multi` fan-out read tool; scope-aware guard and `ErrorLoopState` to prevent repeated read/error loops; normalize paths in loop-detection keys; preserve all read records instead of capping at 20.
- **LLM streaming**: surface retry progress to UI via `RetryProgress` chunk field; add streaming idle/dial/header timeouts to prevent hangs.
- **Tools**: allow agent to operate on any path and render diffs as plain text; accept `file_path` alias for edit/write/read; annotate read scope in tool-call summaries.
- **Config**: make output `max_tokens` configurable, default 128K.
- **Skills**: remove built-in skills, add external skill install flow, skill auto-deactivation, improved UI icons.
- **MCP**: add MCP server support.
- **UI**: display file paths relative to project root; Windows GBK fix.

### Full Changelog

See the auto-generated changelog below for the complete commit list since v0.1.5.
